hero.description: Next-gen health insurance for Ethiopia. Smart, fast, and designed to keep your life moving forward without pauses.
hero.coverCardText: Preventive checkups are fully covered by Lome.

plans.name: Individual Health Plans
plans.description: Comprehensive coverage for one person, offering essential health benefits including outpatient, inpatient, dental, and vision care.

plans.name: Family Health Plans
plans.description: Protect your entire family with our comprehensive plans. One head of household registers and adds spouse and children under one plan.

plans.name: Group Health Plans
plans.description: Employers can offer comprehensive health coverage to their employees. Ideal for companies looking to attract and retain talent.

featuresIntro.title: Designed For Real Life
featuresIntro.description: We've moved beyond traditional insurance. Lome is a tech-first health partner that uses real-time data and seamless digital flows to ensure your health journey is never interrupted.

features.title: Comprehensive Coverage
features.description: From routine check-ups to emergency care, our plans offer extensive coverage tailored to your needs.

features.title: Personalized Service
features.description: Our dedicated team takes time to understand your unique requirements and guide you through every step.

features.title: Financial Security
features.description: Affordable premiums and flexible payment options ensure your healthcare future is secure.

features.title: Digital First
features.description: Modern health-tech designed for the next generation. Quick claims and transparent processing.

calculator.title: Calculate Your Future
calculator.description: Select your plan type and get a precision estimate in seconds.

testimonialsIntro.title: People Who Live Uninterrupted
testimonialsIntro.description: Real experiences from people and teams who switched to Lome.

testimonials.quote: "Lome has been a lifesaver. The coverage is comprehensive and the claims process is so smooth. I feel truly protected knowing I have Lome backing me up."
testimonials.name: Meron Tadesse

testimonials.quote: "Getting my entire family covered was so easy. The registration process is straightforward and the family plan covers everything we need. Highly recommended!"
testimonials.name: Daniel Bekele

testimonials.quote: "We switched our company's health insurance to Lome and it's been the best decision. Our employees love the coverage and the portal makes management easy."
testimonials.name: Sara Hailu
